channel.title: Halloween on ~ The Tobyblog 📝
channel.description: Recent content in Halloween on ~ The Tobyblog 📝

item.title: Nine Useless Jack O' Lantern Templates
item.description: Most of these were taken from the huge catalog of templates over at Stoneykins.com, the vast majority of which are pretty cool and definitely not useless.

item.title: My Favorite Halloween Toy of 2019
item.description: 🎃📻🧡

item.title: Halloween Hits The Shelves
item.description:
Well, well. Look who’s back.

I’ve heard rumors that the Lemax stuff is already on sale at Michaels, too.

item.title: Halloween is Officially On Hold
item.description: October, you have been one long, soggy mess. C’est la vie, I suppose. To commemorate what I anticipate to be tonight’s non-event, I have chosen this song to be the official “hold” music of Halloween 2018, to be played in a continuous loop until one metaphorically throws up one’s hands in disgust, and finally gives up the game. To pick it up again next year? Perhaps. But never quite in the same way.
